defaults.reader: a player, parent, client, or visitor looking through an event gallery
defaults.job: find the right photos and understand what can be viewed, selected, or downloaded

denyTerms.reason: the search implementation is not part of the visitor's task
internal processing language does not explain the visible result

surfaces.name: AI search captions
surfaces.reader: a person searching a gallery by what is visibly happening in a photo
surfaces.job: recognize the photo from one factual sentence
precisionLocks: never infer relationships, emotions, or outcomes
never present uncertain detection as fact

denyTerms.reason: aesthetic judgment makes search captions less factual
promotional judgment makes search captions less factual
aesthetic judgment makes search captions less factual
a photo alone does not establish a relationship between the people shown
